name: Chinois Rib Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Heat the mixture over medium-high heat until it reaches a syrupy consistency.
3. Cook for 50 to 60 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Strain the sauce into a clean container and let it cool.
5. Refrigerate, covered, and use as needed. The sauce will keep for 2 - 3 weeks.
Note: Mirin and rice wine vinegar can be found in stores that sell Oriental products.
